revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[0] cites protocols.how_did_you_get_my_number for Fidel's prior-contact disclosure; correct to the TBD excessive_contact_complaint protocol or flag as unscripted. cherry_pick_moments[1] should cite verify.interest_in_solar's depth_grading:true and expand_to_validate:true properties explicitly. (2) WEAK REASONING — cherry_pick_moments[4] (10:45 in-person vs phone) overstates certainty about appointment format mismatch; revise to note the ambiguity is created by the missing phone-format anchor rather than asserting Fidel definitively expects an in-person visit. cherry_pick_moments[6] coaching_implication invents a new-build bill-trajectory framing not grounded in the schema or transcript; revise to flag as illustrative intent only per numeric_discipline. (3) FLIPPED HYPOTHESIS — cherry_pick_moments[3] (04:14 scope creep) should elevate the strategic/deliberate-curiosity-hook hypothesis from 'rejected' to 'plausible' given the positive state change evidence and Owen's self-correction at 08:35; revise coaching_implication accordingly from 'don't drift' to 'use the escape hatch to create the same curiosity with less scope exposure.' (4) MISSED MOMENTS — add cherry_pick entries for: (a) 03:28 Owen's mid-call driving check as a misplaced button-up element (shows protocol awareness without correct timing); (b) 05:47 Owen's 'best phone call of the day' as a rep-energy signal that may be extending low-value social time. The 50-second water hold (06:04–07:02) should be noted in time_burn context. No fabricated quotes rise to critical severity; all quote mismatches are attribution/boundary issues, not invented text.
